changelog:
- Performance Boost: Reduced attendance engine database polling interval from 10s to 3s for near-instant SMS dispatch
- Cost Formatting: Polished financial UI logging by making SMS cost formatting consistent (strictly padded to 2 decimal places)
- Bug Fix: Fixed 'App Already Running' crash by utilizing a --start-backend CLI flag in the Reports Module instead of launching a parallel uvicorn process
- Bug Fix: Resolved [WinError 5] Access Denied crash on compiled builds by routing generated/uploaded Excel files to the user AppData directory instead of restricted C:\Program Files
- Bug Fix: Addressed empty dates and missing Sender IDs in exported reports by seamlessly propagating sent_at and fallback Sender ID records into generated Excel files
